title: Getting Started with SAP CAP
summary: A hands-on introduction to the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. Learn how to build full-stack applications with CDS services and OData APIs.

title: SAP BTP Architecture Overview
summary: An overview of the SAP Business Technology Platform architecture including Cloud Foundry and Kyma runtimes.

title: Kubernetes for Developers
summary: Learn Kubernetes from scratch — pods pods deployments services and ingress. Ideal for developers moving to containerized workloads.

title: Clean Code Principles
summary: Martin Fowler's heuristics for writing clean maintainable code. Covers naming functions formatting and error handling.

title: Introduction to Machine Learning
summary: Andrew Ng's celebrated Machine Learning Specialization on Coursera. Covers supervised learning neural networks and best practices.

title: SAP Fiori Design Guidelines
summary: The official SAP Fiori design guidelines covering patterns components and interaction design principles for building enterprise UIs.

title: Agile Project Management with Scrum
summary: Learn the foundations of Agile and Scrum methodology. Covers sprint planning backlog grooming retrospectives and team dynamics.

title: Python for Data Analysis — Cheat Sheet
summary: A comprehensive reference cheat sheet for pandas and numpy for data wrangling tasks.

title: Effective Communication for Leaders
summary: Tips and techniques for clear executive communication — structuring messages handling Q&A and presenting to senior stakeholders.

title: CAP Advanced Patterns (Draft)
summary: Internal deep-dive into advanced CAP patterns including draft mode custom handlers and multi-tenancy. Under review.
